name: obsidian-podvault
description: Podvault — Turn podcasts into a searchable knowledge vault in Obsidian.

scripts.release: npm run build && gh release create 0.1.0 main.js manifest.json styles.css --repo mcdullzxr/obsidian-podvault --title "Podvault v0.1.0" --notes-file release-notes.md
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: mcdull
